scripts.codex:setup: npm install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run postgis:extensions && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed && npm run postgis:apply
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build --workspace packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace packages/utils && npm run build --workspace packages/ui && npm run start --workspace apps/mobile
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace packages/contracts && npm run build --workspace packages/utils && npm run build --workspace packages/config && npm run build --workspace packages/ui && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace packages/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/utils && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/config && npm run typecheck --workspace packages/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/mobile
